title: Beware of Married Men
writer: Franz Jacques, Edward T. Lowe Jr., Joseph Jackson
actors: Irene Rich, Clyde Cook, Audrey Ferris
plot: Womanizer Leonard Gilbert (Richard Tucker) lures a variety of ladies to his apartment, complete with cocktail shakers, plush pillows and a Japanese manservant as symbols of sophistication. Some come to be seduced and others , such...
